latestHandover: Round 3 accepted (5 findings). 36 total findings, 56 open tasks. New: GITOPS-01 (Flux CD continuous reconciliation), CI-01 (PR validation pipeline — helm lint, kubeconform, yamllint), GITOPS-02 (image digest pinning via Flux Image Automation), CI-02 (pre-commit hooks), TFCI-01 (Terraform CI plan/apply workflow). IaC-01 withdrawn (Terraform fully implemented). Cloudflared single-replica confirmed. No PodDisruptionBudgets. No image scanning. Round 4 critical gaps being compiled.

sessionHistory.summary: Initial audit research and document production. 21 findings across receptor-infra. Applied DOC-01 fix to receptor-infra docs/security/audit-logging.md.
Round 1 iterative improvements accepted: KYVERNO-01, ARC-01, ETCD-01, MON-04, CERT-01. All updated to open with full task definitions and phased. Total: 26 findings, 39 open tasks.
